case_title: PORTOLA AUTO SERVICE INC VS SIGNS AMERICA, INCORP et al

docket_entries.description: CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23417, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTOLA AUTO SERVICE INC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SIGNS AMERICA, INCORP CHUCK LANTZ  DBA SIGN-UP PLTFF.
